channel.title: Forgebook
channel.description: Forgebook is a Microsoft Foundry cookbook of runnable Jupyter notebook recipes, hands-on AI guides, and examples for building agents, model inference, and multimodal apps.

item.title: Fix Agent Citations for Custom Azure AI Search Schemas
item.description: Get real url/title citations from the Azure AI Search tool when your index fields aren't named url/title/content — register the index as an asset with a FieldMapping and use index_asset_id.
item.author: Farzad Sunavala

item.title: Create Your First Agent (Part 1)
item.description: Step-by-step tutorial to deploy gpt-5.4-mini on Microsoft Foundry, create an AI agent with Web Search, and test it — all from the Foundry portal. Part 1 of 4.
item.author: Nick Brady

item.title: Tools and Your First Code (Part 2)
item.description: Connect your agent to Microsoft Learn and GitHub MCP servers. Handle MCP approval requests, explore the tool catalog, and see your agent defined in YAML and Python.
item.author: Nick Brady

item.title: Generate Images with MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e
item.description: MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e text-to-image notebook with prompt variations, parameter tuning, and token-based cost calculations.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Build a Production Editing Recipe with MAI-Image-2.5
item.description: Private-preview MAI-Image-2.5 notebook covering text-to-image generation, image edits, safety reminders, and troubleshooting.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Call MAI-Image-2 from a Foundry Deployment
item.description: Foundry-focused MAI-Image-2 notebook covering deployment-based calls, prompt variants, and cost breakdown.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Build Speech-to-Text with MAI-Transcribe-1.5
item.description: Speech API multipart cookbook for MAI-Transcribe-1.5 covering baseline transcription, verbatim mode, phrase-list entity biasing, and language identification.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Transcribe Audio with MAI-Transcribe-1
item.description: Entra-first MAI-Transcribe-1 notebook with Foundry endpoint setup, local audio transcription, translation, diarization fallback guidance, and cost estimation.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Generate Speech with MAI-Voice-1
item.description: MAI-Voice-1 notebook using Foundry endpoint with REST and SDK patterns, long-form synthesis, and character-based cost estimation.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Build Multilingual TTS with MAI-Voice-2-Preview
item.description: MAI-Voice-2-Preview notebook with REST calls, multilingual prebuilt voices, gated voice-prompting guidance, and model-card-aligned preview notes.
item.author: Anirban Ganguly

item.title: Mastering Foundry IQ
item.description: End-to-end Foundry IQ walkthrough: every Knowledge Source type, one unified Knowledge Base, and integrations with Foundry Agent Service and Microsoft Agent Framework.
item.author: Farzad Sunavala

item.title: Microsoft IQ in Foundry
item.description: Build your own knowledge layer in Foundry IQ: start with your own files (zero setup), then layer in Web IQ, Work IQ, and Fabric IQ, and query every source with one call.
item.author: Farzad Sunavala

item.title: Guide Sora 2 with Images and Audio
item.description: Use Azure OpenAI REST calls to generate a Sora 2 clip, reuse a frame as an image reference, and add ambient audio.
item.author: Nick Brady
